segments.text: He takes that but just barely survives!
Approach into a quick jab into the dash attack!
segments.original_text: 差し込みからのちょび打ちからのダッシュアタック

full_text: He takes that but just barely survives! But here... Approach into a quick jab into the dash attack!

corrections.rule: misheard: 最初と→差し込みからの
